code:
setCps(0.0)
$: index(video("[HCP-4P0eoOo.mp4@4 blue.mp4@1], blue.mp4!2(5,5,0) ~/2(5,8,6) [~/3*2 ~ ~/2 hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4?0.3!2]?, hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4?0.2? red.mp4@1(2,6,2) ~/2 ~").urlBase('/test-assets/').begin(rand.spline(0.35)), video("[hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4 blue.mp4 red.mp4]? | HCP-4P0eoOo.mp4!4*2").urlBase('/test-assets/').dur(sine2.lerp("cubic [cubic!3 bounce*2 quint quint/3/4]?0.1*4 ~", 'inout')).pixelate(50).sync(true), s("red*3 blue.mp4@1 {blue red.mp4!2/4}%4? red?(5,5,0), ~ red.mp4!2(3,6,4) blue").urlBase('/test-assets/').scaleX("[<1(4,8) 3 1?0.6?> 1.5?0.3] ~, 0.5 1*4 0.5@4/2").y("<0> 0.25(5,5,2)?0.1 0, [{0/4 1!3*3 1?!4 <0.5/3 1 0.75?0.9>?0.4}%4 0.25@1?]!3!3, 1/4*2")).cols(4).rows(3).gridMod().scale("1*2")
---
setCps(2.0)
$: screen("redvid, clipB!4").pixelate(64).cropStack(2, 3).gridMod().alpha("0*4@4 [0.5(4,6)/4 0.5@4 0?? 0.75]*2*4")
codes:
setCps(0.0)
$: index(video("[HCP-4P0eoOo.mp4@4 blue.mp4@1], blue.mp4!2(5,5,0) ~/2(5,8,6) [~/3*2 ~ ~/2 hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4?0.3!2]?, hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4?0.2? red.mp4@1(2,6,2) ~/2 ~").urlBase('/test-assets/').begin(rand.spline(0.35)), video("[hXJaBfcdCKM.mp4 blue.mp4 red.mp4]? | HCP-4P0eoOo.mp4!4*2").urlBase('/test-assets/').dur(sine2.lerp("cubic [cubic!3 bounce*2 quint quint/3/4]?0.1*4 ~", 'inout')).pixelate(50).sync(true), s("red*3 blue.mp4@1 {blue red.mp4!2/4}%4? red?(5,5,0), ~ red.mp4!2(3,6,4) blue").urlBase('/test-assets/').scaleX("[<1(4,8) 3 1?0.6?> 1.5?0.3] ~, 0.5 1*4 0.5@4/2").y("<0> 0.25(5,5,2)?0.1 0, [{0/4 1!3*3 1?!4 <0.5/3 1 0.75?0.9>?0.4}%4 0.25@1?]!3!3, 1/4*2")).cols(4).rows(3).gridMod().scale("1*2")
